title: Sons of the Pioneers
writer: Mauri Grashin, Robert T. Shannon, M. Coates Webster
actors: Roy Rogers, George 'Gabby' Hayes, Sons of the Pioneers
plot: Night raiders are burning down the ranchers' barns and poisoning their cattle. Sheriff Gabby, unable to cope, goes east to get help from Roy, descendant of two famous sheriffs. Roy is a young entomologist who would rather study bu...
